prerequisites: A running SurrealDB instance (Airbyte's connector requires SurrealDB v2.2.0 or above) that is reachable over the network from where the sync runs.
The namespace and database that data should be written into (set via surrealdb_namespace and surrealdb_database). In SurrealDB a database acts as the schema in which all tables live.

A SurrealDB user account with sufficient privileges to create and write tables. The Airbyte docs recommend a user with DEFINE TABLE, DEFINE INDEX, UPSERT, SELECT, and REMOVE permissions, for example one created with: DEFINE USER airbyte ON ROOT PASSWORD "your_password" ROLES OWNER;
The connection endpoint URL for the SurrealDB instance (set via surrealdb_url).

authMethods.name: Username and password (SurrealDB system user)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a SurrealDB system user's username and password, supplied via the surrealdb_username and surrealdb_password config fields, scoped to the namespace and database given by surrealdb_namespace and surrealdb_database. Create or grant the user with a DEFINE USER statement (for example DEFINE USER airbyte ON ROOT PASSWORD "..." ROLES OWNER). The connector descriptor defines no separate secret fields; the password is provided through surrealdb_password.

setupSteps.title: Provision the SurrealDB instance and target namespace/database
setupSteps.body: Ensure a SurrealDB instance (v2.2.0 or above per the Airbyte connector requirement) is running and reachable from your sync environment. Decide on the namespace and database to write into; the connector creates one table per stream within that database.

setupSteps.title: Create a user with write permissions
setupSteps.body: Define a SurrealDB user the connector will authenticate as. The Airbyte docs recommend a user with DEFINE TABLE, DEFINE INDEX, UPSERT, SELECT, and REMOVE permissions, for example: DEFINE USER airbyte ON ROOT PASSWORD "your_password" ROLES OWNER; Record the username and password for the connector config.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Provide the required config fields: surrealdb_url (the connection endpoint of the SurrealDB instance), surrealdb_username and surrealdb_password (the credentials of the user created above), and surrealdb_namespace and surrealdb_database (the target namespace and database). Note the connector lowercases all table, schema, and column identifiers, and each stream is written as a table with _airbyte_raw_id, _airbyte_extracted_at, and _airbyte_data columns.
